headline: Life Insurance Stocks Q1 Results: Benchmarking Globe Life (NYSE:GL)
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at life insurance stocks, starting with Globe Life (NYSE:GL).

headline: Globe Life: An Attractive Share Cannibal
summary: Globe Life stock remains a "Buy" as it continues to buyback shares, providing 12% upside potential. Here's what investors need to know.
